briefdescription.para: The underlying ordered item container.
The owning surface.
The ordered child surfaces.
Optional surface manager.
Create a child surface container for the given owner surface.

parameterdescription.para: The owning surface.

briefdescription.para: Attach a manager for child-surface policy and notifications.

parameterdescription.para: The manager to attach.

briefdescription.para: Clear the attached surface manager.
Test if there are no child surfaces.
Get the number of child surfaces.
Get a child surface by index without bounds checks.
Get a child surface by index with bounds checks.

parameterdescription.para: If the index is outside the child list.

briefdescription.para: Get layout data for the child surface at the given index.

parameterdescription.para: If the index is outside the child list.

briefdescription.para: Get layout data for the given child surface.

simplesect.para: The layout data, or an empty pointer if the surface is not a child.

briefdescription.para: Replace layout data for the child surface at the given index.

parameterdescription.para: The child surface index.
The new layout data.

briefdescription.para: Replace layout data for the given child surface.

parameterdescription.para: The child surface.
The new layout data.

briefdescription.para: Add a child surface at the end.

parameterdescription.para: The surface to add.
If the surface is null, already present, or would create a cycle.

briefdescription.para: Add a child surface with layout data at the end.

parameterdescription.para: The surface to add.
The layout data for the parent-child relation.
If the surface is null, already present, or would create a cycle.

briefdescription.para: Remove the child surface at the given index.

parameterdescription.para: The index to remove.
If the index is outside the child list.

briefdescription.para: Remove the given child surface.

parameterdescription.para: The child surface to remove.

briefdescription.para: Remove all child surfaces.
Insert a child surface before the given index.

parameterdescription.para: The insertion index.
The surface to insert.
If the surface is null, already present, or would create a cycle.
If the index is outside the valid insertion range.

memberdef.argsstring: (std::size_t index, SurfacePtr surface, LayoutDataPtr data) override
memberdef.name: insert

briefdescription.para: Insert a child surface with layout data before the given index.

parameterdescription.para: The insertion index.
The surface to insert.
The layout data for the parent-child relation.
If the surface is null, already present, or would create a cycle.
If the index is outside the valid insertion range.

briefdescription.para: Insert a child surface after the given anchor.

parameterdescription.para: The existing child surface after which the new surface is inserted.
The surface to insert.
If the surface is null, already present, or would create a cycle.
If the anchor is not a child surface.

briefdescription.para: Insert a child surface before the given anchor.

parameterdescription.para: The existing child surface before which the new surface is inserted.
The surface to insert.
If the surface is null, already present, or would create a cycle.
If the anchor is not a child surface.

briefdescription.para: Replace an existing child surface.

parameterdescription.para: The existing child surface.
The replacement surface.
If the replacement is null, already present, or would create a cycle.
If the old surface is not a child surface.

memberdef.argsstring: (const SurfacePtr &oldSurface, SurfacePtr newSurface, LayoutDataPtr data) override
memberdef.name: replace

briefdescription.para: Replace an existing child surface and layout data.

parameterdescription.para: The existing child surface.
The replacement surface.
The layout data for the replacement surface.
If the replacement is null, already present, or would create a cycle.
If the old surface is not a child surface.

briefdescription.para: Replace the child surface at the given index.

parameterdescription.para: The replacement index.
The replacement surface.
If the replacement is null, already present, or would create a cycle.
If the index is outside the child list.

memberdef.argsstring: (std::size_t index, SurfacePtr surface, LayoutDataPtr data) override
memberdef.name: replace

briefdescription.para: Replace the child surface and layout data at the given index.

parameterdescription.para: The replacement index.
The replacement surface.
The layout data for the replacement surface.
If the replacement is null, already present, or would create a cycle.
If the index is outside the child list.

briefdescription.para: Move a child surface to a new index.

parameterdescription.para: The current child index.
The new child index.
If either index is outside the child list.

briefdescription.para: Move a child surface to a new index.

parameterdescription.para: The child surface to move.
The new child index.
If the surface is not a child or the index is outside the child list.

briefdescription.para: Move a child surface after the given anchor.

parameterdescription.para: The child surface to move.
The anchor after which the surface is moved.
If either surface is not a child surface.

briefdescription.para: Move a child surface before the given anchor.

parameterdescription.para: The child surface to move.
The anchor before which the surface is moved.
If either surface is not a child surface.

briefdescription.para: Find the index of a child surface or throw if it is not present.
Find the index of a child surface.
Test if the given surface is in the parent chain of the owner surface.
Validate a new child surface before insertion.
Create default layout data when none was supplied.
Enforce the attached manager's maximum child count.
Detach the child surface from a different current parent.
Set this container as the parent for the given surface.
Clear this container as the parent for the given surface.
Mark the owner surface as requiring layout.
Ordered child surface collection for one surface.
